flavorText: Battle Masters are students of war who employ martial techniques called maneuvers to dominate the battlefield.

features.description: You learn maneuvers fueled by Superiority Dice. You have four d8 Superiority Dice, regain all expended dice on a short or long rest, and learn three maneuvers from the Battle Master list. Maneuver save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + STR or DEX modifier (your choice).

maneuvers.description: Add a Superiority Die to a Stealth check or Initiative roll.
Swap places with a willing ally and add the die to one creature's AC until your next turn.
When a creature enters your reach, use your reaction to make one attack and add the die to damage.
Forego one attack to direct an ally to strike using their reaction, adding the die to damage.
Add a Superiority Die to Intimidation, Performance, or Persuasion checks.
Add the die to damage and force a STR save or the target drops one held item.
Add the die to damage; the next attack roll against the target by another creature has advantage.
When you move, add the die to AC until you stop moving.
Use a bonus action and one die to gain advantage on your next attack this turn; add the die to damage on hit.
Add the die to damage; target makes a WIS save or has disadvantage on attacks against creatures other than you.
When you attack, expend a die to increase reach by 5 feet and add the die to damage on hit.
Add the die to damage and let an ally move up to half speed without provoking opportunity attacks from the target.
Add the die to damage; target makes a WIS save or is frightened of you until end of your next turn.
Use your reaction to reduce melee damage by the die + your DEX modifier.
Add the die to an attack roll after seeing the roll but before knowing whether it hits.
Add the die to damage; Large or smaller target makes a STR save or is pushed up to 15 feet.

features.description: Gain proficiency with one type of artisan's tools of your choice, or learn one additional maneuver from the Battle Master list.

By observing or interacting with a creature outside combat, you can discern key combat statistics such as Strength, Dexterity, Constitution, Armor Class, current Hit Points, and class levels relative to your own.
When you roll Initiative and have no Superiority Dice remaining, you regain one Superiority Die.

battlemaster-combat-superiority.summary: Gain Superiority Dice, maneuvers, and a tactical save DC that turn the subclass into a real battlefield control engine.
battlemaster-combat-superiority.description: Combat Superiority is the whole Battle Master engine. The fighter is no longer only making ordinary attacks; they are choosing the right maneuver, spending the right die, and shaping movement, fear, accuracy, or ally positioning on purpose.
battlemaster-combat-superiority.recovery: Regain all expended Superiority Dice on a Short or Long Rest.
battlemaster-combat-superiority.effect: Maneuvers add control, protection, pressure, or precision to weapon play.

battlemaster-student-of-war.summary: Battle study expands your identity beyond attack math by adding a practical tool edge or a broader maneuver menu.

battlemaster-know-your-enemy.summary: Read a target before the fight and learn what kind of problem you are actually about to engage.

battlemaster-relentless.summary: Even when you start a fight dry on tactical fuel, the subclass gives you enough back to matter.
battlemaster-relentless.description: When you roll Initiative and have no Superiority Dice remaining, you regain one Superiority Die. Relentless protects the Battle Master from starting a fight dry on tactical fuel and keeps maneuvers relevant in the next encounter.
